Joar Rañon Sabate (October 19, 2002) known professionally as Lil Joar is a Filipino singer-songwriter an aspiring musician and social media influencer dedicated to using music as a powerful tool for inspiration and connection. Hailing from Bicol, Philippines, he discovered a passion for music at an early age, finding solace and expression through melodies and lyrics.Lil Joar he is an independent musical artist signed with Bicol Records. Lil Joar he was creating an original song using his stage name got a first single album and composed that it's called "Sulat Kamay" was released on 19th day of November 2024 available on the digital streaming platforms.Drawing influence from a diverse range of genres, including R&B/Soul, Pop and Original Pinoy Music (OPM) blends heartfelt storytelling with infectious rhythms, creating a sound that resonates with listeners. His lyrics often reflect personal experiences, struggles, and triumphs, aiming to uplift and empower those who hear them.Over the years, Lil Joar has performed at local venues and community events, building a loyal following and fostering a sense of camaraderie among fans. His commitment to authenticity and vulnerability in songwriting has earned him praise for his relatable messages and emotional depth.In addition to crafting original music, Lil Joar is actively involved in community initiatives, using his platform to advocate for mental health awareness, environmental sustainability and youth empowerment. He believes in the transformative power of music and is dedicated to making a positive impact through his art.As Lil Joar continues to hone his craft and share his journey, he remains focused on inspiring others to embrace their own stories and find strength in their voices. With an unwavering passion for music, Lil Joar is poised to make a lasting impression on the world, one song at a time.

Dastgeer Khan attended Stepping Stone Inter College for his schooling and later pursued a Bachelor of Business Administration degree from Kailash Institute of Management.He discovered his interest in digital marketing during the lockdown in 2021 and started his online journey, eventually founding his digital agency, Bizacademy.in, which provides digital courses and online education. His breakthrough came with the launch of his book and course, "Youtube Mastermind: Become Successful in Sales," as well as through his partnership with Praveen Kumar Rai and Momin Khan. Dastgeer's motivation line is "Learn, Create, and Spread the joy of Knowledge."

Jayden Engel is an American actor.Originally, Engel planned to further his education after high school. But ultimately took a gap year to reevaluate his path. During that time, he became deeply interested in how people operate within their environments, communities, and traditions. This curiosity about human behavior and the diverse ways individuals experience life sparked his passion for storytelling through acting and writing.He made his screen debut in 2025 as Frankie in Blood at the Root, a thesis short film produced at NYU's Tisch School of the Arts. The project introduced him to screen acting and solidified his interest in performance as a means of exploring identity, emotion, and connection.

Julija Đukić is a Serbian fitness influencer, certified personal trainer, and content creator best known as one half of the dynamic duo Fitness Bliznakinje, alongside her twin sister Natalija. Julija developed an early passion for sports, training in rhythmic gymnastics, swimming, and volleyball before committing to fitness as a career. After earning certification as a fitness instructor, Julija and her sister launched their brand across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube, quickly gaining traction for their upbeat workout routines, vegan lifestyle tips, and synchronized twin training videos. Their TikTok account boasts over 80,000 followers and 3.3 million likes, while their YouTube channel features popular videos like Treniranje u paru. In 2022, Julija made her television debut in the music reality show Prvi Bend Srbije, aired on Insta TV. Though she and her sister did not reach the finals, their appearance significantly boosted their public profile. Beyond fitness, Julija has expressed interest in expanding into music, dance, and screenwriting. She has teased plans for a debut single and a film project inspired by her life experiences.

Starting his political journey in 2013, Mohammad Ali Mostafa Piam is a dedicated Bangladeshi public figure and social activist committed to community development. Widely recognized for his multifaceted career, he transitioned from a successful background in the creative arts as a music artist and director to a full-time role in public service. Currently, Piam is actively engaged in grassroots politics, focusing on local governance and social welfare. He aims to represent his community as a Councilor, with a vision to build a modern, transparent, and youth-friendly administrative structure. Before focusing entirely on his political journey, he established a strong digital presence through various creative and cinematic contributions.

Abhishek Shukla is the founder of Fabric Bazzar, a prominent Surat-based wholesale fabric supplier known for its embroidery, handwork, and designer textiles, blending traditional Indian fabrics with modern trends for boutiques and designers nationwide, with a focus on quality, trust, and innovation in the textile hub of Saroli. He's an entrepreneur with a BBA in Finance, inspiring others through his journey, writing, and travel, aiming to build strong relationships in the textile market.

Akram Mohammed Al-Sarray is an Iraqi visual artist known for a distinctive style that bridges cultural tradition with fine arts. He developed an early passion for visual expression, focusing on themes of identity and contemporary narratives. Al-Sarray's work in the art department is characterized by bold experimentation with color and form. He has established himself as a rising voice in the Middle Eastern art scene through his dedication to visual storytelling and plastic arts innovation.

Nart Madi is the founder and CEO of Senro, an American artificial intelligence company building an AI assistant that helps account executives answer questions during sales calls.Before founding Senro, he served as a tech lead at a Seattle-based AI startup, where he led a team of engineers under executive mentorship from leaders with backgrounds at Stanford, Microsoft, Oracle, and Uber. Earlier, he worked as an AI engineer at a Dubai-based startup, where he contributed to an award-winning AI chatbot recognized with two Fast Company Innovation Awards.Madi earned a Bachelor of Science in Computing and Information Technologies from the Rochester Institute of Technology and is currently completing a Master of Science in Data Analytics there, with graduation expected in May 2026. His graduate research focuses on 3D deep learning for pulmonary nodule malignancy classification in CT imaging. Concurrently with his undergraduate studies, he completed 42 School's intensive computer science program, known for its peer-to-peer, project-based learning model.

Miller was an accomplished alpinist who had already gained international attention for claiming the first solo ascent of Mount McKinley's Slovak Direct, a technically difficult route that took him 56 hours to complete, in June. He grew up climbing in Alaska with his brother and their father, who was also a climber. This year, Balin Miller had also spent weeks solo climbing in Patagonia and the Canadian Rockies, ticking off a notoriously difficult ice climb called Reality Bath, which had been unrepeated for 37 years, according to Climbing magazine. Balin had probably one of the most impressive last six months of climbing of anyone.

Natalija Đukić is a Serbian fitness trainer and social media personality who rose to prominence alongside her twin sister Julija as the "Fitness Bliznakinje." With a background in rhythmic gymnastics and a passion for healthy living, Natalija earned certification as a fitness instructor and began sharing workout routines, vegan recipes, and motivational content across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube. The duo gained national attention not only for their identical appearance and synchronized lifestyle but also for their participation in the 2022 reality show Prvi bend Srbije. Though they didn't reach the finals, their visibility skyrocketed, especially among younger audiences.

Francisco Teixeira, known by his stage name Alencis, was born in 2002 in Torres Vedras, Portugal. From the age of 12, he developed a passion for electronic music, listening to and following artists such as Avicii, Martin Garrix, and David Guetta.Inspired by Avicii's talent, in 2018, he decided to focus on music production. Determination and resilience were key to his journey, starting from scratch as a self-taught artist. He later learned from artists at different levels, experimented tirelessly, and, despite facing challenges that led to failures, grew immensely to become the artist we know today.Alencis is currently making a name for himself as a music producer and DJ, standing out not only for his talent but also for the overcoming journey that led him to achieve great results.One of his biggest successes is the track "Just Dance!", released through Chapter Eight Records. The track, produced in collaboration with Denro, stood out for its vibrant energy and reached the Top 30 on Beatport in the Bass House releases category, reaffirming Alencis' talent for creating tracks that resonate with audiences and stand out on global platforms.Alencis has also performed at some of the biggest parties in Portugal, establishing himself as a prominent figure in the country's music scene. His high-energy performances have captured the crowd and strengthened his status as one of the most promising artists in the electronic music world.In January 2024, he took on a new challenge by moving to Eindhoven, Netherlands. Prasanna Kumara Dissanayake is a Sri Lankan professional nature photographer and digital designer. He has gained international attention for his captivating macro photography and botanical documentation of Sri Lanka's biodiversity. As the founder of the 'Hidden Wonders of Sri Lankan Flora' initiative, he focuses on digital conservation through high-definition visual storytelling, blending art and environmental science.

Tremain Minty-Dodd, Better Known as ''TR3W3Y'' is a Canadian Musician, Rapper and Songwriter born on the 8th of January 2003 in Winnipeg, Canada. In the vast landscape of modern music, few transformations are as profound and inspiring as the journey of TR3W3Y. Born and raised in the vibrant city of Winnipeg, Manitoba, Canada, TR3W3Y embarked on his musical odyssey at the tender age of 15, What began as a foray into secular music soon evolved into a profound spiritual awakening, leading him to embrace the powerful medium of gospel rap. As TR3W3Y continues to ascend the ranks of the music industry, he remains steadfast in his commitment to giving back. Plans to venture into artist management and launch his own line of merchandise are on the horizon, promising an exciting new chapter in his already illustrious career.

Tori Maxwell is a screenwriter and former child actor with credits in television, film, and commercials, including Ray Donovan, Animal Kingdom, Westworld, and The Conjuring 2. Drawing from years of on-set experience, Tori brings an understanding of story, character, and production to their writing.A non-binary Christian navigating neurodivergence and chronic neuropathic pain, Tori centers authenticity and emotional truth in character-driven stories exploring empathy, identity, and inclusion. Their work blends grounded human experience with genre influences inspired by comic-book worlds and mythic storytelling.Beyond screenwriting, Tori is developing a global creative platform designed to connect meaningful projects, fundraising initiatives, and interactive storytelling, merging art, social impact, and innovation into a single ecosystem.

Likhon Ahmed is a Bangladeshi entrepreneur, No-Code/Low-Code web developer, and educator. He is the Founder & CEO of Likhon.Net and Co-Founder of EduCubix. Likhon is known for his innovative approach to technology and his dedication to empowering individuals and businesses with high-quality web solutions and real-world freelance education.Likhon's journey in the tech world began in 2020 when he started working as a No-Code/Low-Code web developer, focusing on creating scalable, user-friendly websites without complex coding. His growing expertise earned him recognition, and he soon became a Level Two Freelancer on Fiverr, where he delivers top-notch web solutions to clients globally. On May 14, 2024, Likhon founded Likhon.Net, a company offering Web3-based web templates, Figma UI/UX design templates, and custom web development solutions. Likhon's goal with Likhon.Net is to provide cutting-edge, Web3-driven services that cater to the modern needs of businesses and individuals. His company focuses on delivering high-quality Web Design, Development, UI/UX Design, and Branding, helping clients stay ahead in an ever-evolving digital world. Alongside his work at Likhon.Net, Likhon co-founded EduCubix, an educational platform aimed at teaching real-world freelance skills. EduCubix was created to address the need for a trusted, high-quality educational resource in Bangladesh, where individuals can learn the practical skills required to succeed as freelancers. Likhon is passionate about providing education that empowers individuals to build sustainable careers, without compromising on teaching standards. Likhon's career path took a significant turn when he made the decision to drop out of school in class 10. Instead of continuing his formal education, he chose to dedicate himself entirely to his career. This pivotal decision allowed him to fully immerse himself in the tech industry and entrepreneurship, laying the foundation for his future successes. Today, Likhon's story is a powerful example of determination, resilience, and the ability to succeed outside the traditional educational system. His work with Likhon.Net and EduCubix continues to inspire others to follow their passions, pursue continuous learning, and take bold steps toward their own entrepreneurial journeys. Through his ventures, Likhon is not only revolutionizing the web development industry but also shaping the future of freelance education. Whether through providing advanced web solutions or teaching others the skills to succeed in freelancing, Likhon is committed to making a lasting impact on individuals and businesses alike.

Daniel Jackson is the incumbent President of the Free Republic of Verdis during the time that Verdis' provisional government is in power. Jackson has been serving as the President of the Free Republic of Verdis since the 30th of May 2019. Since entering office, Jackson's administration has been largely dedicated to working towards international recognition, funding, and the overall nationbuilding of the Free Republic of Verdis. He was born on December 7, 2004, in Upper Ferntree Gully, Australia, and was raised in Australia and the United Kingdom. In 2019, he became one of the youngest politicians in the world. President Jackson has joined on surveying and cadastral trips in Verdis prior to the permanent settlement, and was one of the Verdisian's who were detained when Croatian police violated international law by entering Verdis in October 2023. President Jackson has also made two humanitarian trips to Ukraine with other Verdisian volunteers.

In the dynamic world of digital entrepreneurship, Aayush stands out as a remarkable prodigy who has left an indelible mark at a remarkably young age. Aayush's exceptional vision and talent have positioned him as a pioneering force in the industry.From the outset, Aayush's unwavering passion for the digital realm has been his guiding star. He embarked on his entrepreneurial journey with a clear and audacious vision, driven by the desire to revolutionize social media. The creation of Ciez Media marked the genesis of a digital revolution that has transformed the way people engage with these platforms.One of Aayush's most extraordinary achievements lies in his unparalleled ability to breathe new life into accounts unjustly closed for false reasons. His deep understanding of the intricacies of social media and his relentless pursuit of truth have made him a beacon of justice in the digital sphere. He has tirelessly fought for justice and redemption, championing the cause of countless models, influencers, and businessmen.Aayush's dedication and commitment have yielded remarkable results as he has successfully led numerous individuals on their journey to reclaim their digital identities. His mastery of the industry has earned him legendary status, with Ciez Media becoming synonymous with excellence and innovation.Aayush's journey is not merely defined by entrepreneurial success; it is a testament to the power of determination, vision, and unwavering dedication. At a mere 18 years of age, he stands as a shining example and an inspiration to aspiring entrepreneurs worldwide. His story unequivocally demonstrates that age is no barrier to making a profound and lasting impact on the digital stage.In 2023, Aayush made waves in the social media world, reshaping the way people perceive and interact with these digital platforms. Through Ciez Media, he continues to shape the future of online entrepreneurship, leaving an indelible mark on the industry and inspiring countless others to relentlessly pursue their dreams. Aayush's journey is a testament to the incredible heights one can reach with determination, innovation, and an authentic passion for making a difference in the world of social media.

Caesarmusic, whose real name is Adedoyin Morebise, is a Nigerian Afrobeat singer, TikTok influencer, and content creator born on May 18, 2004, in Ode-Irele, Ondo State, Nigeria. He is known for his viral remix freestyles and engaging celebrity-driven content across social platforms.Caesarmusic began gaining online traction in 2023 through TikTok, where he created humorous remixes of popular Nigerian songs using creative instrumentals. He started his professional music journey in 2024, and quickly rose to prominence when his freestyle remix of "Ifa Wa Kayejo" - originally by Damidrizzy - went viral on TikTok. The sound attracted over 10,000 user-generated videos, with notable influencers like Seun Pizzle and even Damidrizzy himself jumping on the trend. The viral moment led to reposts by top Nigerian blogs including GossipMillTV, further amplifying his visibility.He officially debuted his first single titled "Trabaye" on March 13, 2024, marking his transition from content creator to recording artist. In addition to his viral remixes, Caesarmusic has created TikTok content around top artists like Zinoleesky, Seyi Vibez, and Ballo Ranking. Though he hasn't yet released a music video, his remix approach and commentary-style content have made him a recognizable figure among Gen Z audiences in Nigeria.As of July 2025, Caesarmusic has built a growing fan base with over 300,000 followers on TikTok, and he actively promotes music for both emerging artists and established names like Davido, Wizkid, and Seyi Vibez. Outside of music, he shares celebrity updates and trending news, contributing to Nigeria's online pop culture scene.His stage name "Caesarmusic" was chosen to reflect a bold, commanding presence in music - inspired by a blend of creativity and ambition.Although he has not yet received formal awards or press features, Caesarmusic has set his sights on becoming a household name in Afrobeat, aspiring to reach the heights of stars like Davido, Wizkid, and Burna Boy.

Abubakar Siddique (pronounced: A·bu-Bekr Siddiq [uh-boo-bek-er sid-dik]) was born in Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. He is the youngest of three siblings, with two older sisters. His father was a college professor.At just 14 years old, inspired by his passion for art, Abubakar Siddique founded PRODUCTIONS VIDEO COMIC BOOK (PRODUCTIONS VCB) in 2019, an entertainment company that marked the beginning of his creative journey. Although he later dropped out of his software engineering course in his second year, his dedication to creative pursuits never wavered. He continued writing, producing, and directing films that uplifted his community.At 16, in 2021, he faced personal loss when his father passed away due to COVID-19. Four years later, in 2025, at age 20, he faced another heartbreaking tragedy when his beloved mother passed away from cancer. Instead of being defeated by these profound hardships, Abubakar channeled his grief into his mission, remaining committed to his work and believing his voice could make a meaningful impact around the world.As the founder and CEO of PRODUCTIONS VCB, Abubakar Siddique is also an actor and entrepreneur.

Salil Arora is an elite Indian wicket-keeper batter currently dominating the Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 for Sunrisers Hyderabad (SRH). Hailing from Amritsar, Punjab, he built a formidable reputation in the domestic circuit with the Punjab cricket team and previously represented India’s Under-19 squad that won the Under-19 Asia Cup. Known for his fearless finishing abilities, explosive "no-look" sixes, and an extreme strike rate exceeding 175 in the IPL, he has become a massive crowd favorite. While he is universally recognized across the global sports industry, international news media, and cricket boards by his professional stage name 'Salil Arora', his legal birth name documented on his official government IDs is 'Sahil'. Furthermore, his true and officially verified Date of Birth is January 14, 2005. Operating at the highest echelon of Indian cricket, he has established himself not just as a dynamic powerhouse on the field, but as a highly valuable brand in the sports entertainment sector.

Ifty Azad is the youngest millionaire in Bangladesh. He now lives in California, United States. Ifty Azad has risen to prominence through a powerful blend of innovation, passion, and purpose.He owns a few multi-million dollar worth and highly successful businesses, including a multi-million dollar tech company, a booming Tire & Wheel enterprise, and 3 trendsetting clothing brand-each marking his influence across multiple industries in the United States. His clothing brand FiberPunk is liked by most of the Americans while his another brand Diagram is one of the biggest clothing brands in Bangladesh. Ifty is also an Esports enthusiast and the owner of a competitive Esports organization, solidifying his presence in the digital entertainment world.His dedication goes far beyond business. Ifty has made notable contributions to international causes and was an active student leader during the mass movement in Bangladesh in July. His role as a student activist earned him widespread respect for standing up for justice and voicing the concerns of the youth.Equally passionate about the future of technology, Ifty Azad is widely recognized for his work in Artificial Intelligence training, helping shape the next generation of intelligent systems and innovations.With 13 international awards, Ifty Azad's achievements speak volumes. From Dhaka to California, from activism to AI, his story is a powerful testament to resilience, vision, and the bold spirit of a new generation.

As of August 2024, his company continues to thrive and expand in the competitive market.

At 16, he shared his experience on YouTube, inspiring young entrepreneurs.At 17, he left school to dedicate himself completely to his mission: helping others to start their own business through his digital content. Today, he has established himself as a benchmark in youth entrepreneurship. He is famous for his financial advice videos. He shares his insights and tips on investing, personal finance, and entrepreneurship.

Nabil Alaoui is a Moroccan music producer and DJ, born in the city of Fez on January 12, 2005. He started his musical career in 2018 and quickly became one of the best EDM producers in the Arab world. Nabil's first release was titled "My Life," and it was distributed by Ditto Music, achieving global success. The idea for producing this song came because Nabil was inspired by several major artists, notably Alan Walker, Ahrix, K-391, and Martin Garrix. Now, Nabil Alaoui has completed his first album for 2025, titled "Another World," which consists of 15 songs from various genres such as pop, EDM, hip hop, cinematic, and more.

Iverson Rupido was born in Manila, Philippines, and spent part of his childhood in Singapore before eventually settling in Vancouver, British Columbia. Growing up across different cultures helped shape his creativity and curiosity, both of which would later influence his passion for performing.Iverson first discovered his love for theatre in Grade 10 at Earl Marriott Secondary School. What began as a school activity quickly turned into a genuine passion for the stage. During his time there, he performed memorable roles such as Donkey in "Shrek The Musical" (2023) and Miles in "She Kills Monsters" (2022), experiences that allowed him to develop his confidence, comedic timing, and stage presence.After graduating high school, Iverson briefly stepped away from theatre to focus on his studies at Simon Fraser University, where he pursued his university education. However, the pull of the stage never faded. In November 2025, his passion for performing reignited when he returned to theatre and landed a role in "High School Musical: On Stage!" with Align Entertainment, marking an exciting return to live performance.With a growing passion for musical theatre, Iverson continues to pursue opportunities on stage while balancing his academic journey. As he develops his craft, he remains committed to telling stories, connecting with audiences, and exploring new creative challenges in theatre and beyond.

Ali Hamza is an American filmmaker raised in Lexington, Kentucky. He was raised by his parents Azfar and Shahana Hamza. At age 13, he was given his first smartphone as a birthday present, using it strictly to make skits that are now considered memories. Hamza's passion for cinematography didn't come in full swing until August 2021, when he was given the opportunity to work with Frederick Douglass High School's morning news program. Since then, he has helped produce many short films in high school and college such as "Plunged into Mystery" in 2022, as well as "The Clique" and "Drink Milk." in 2024, with "Plunged into Mystery" winning second place in the Cinemania competition in the 2022 Kentucky STLP state conference, and "The Clique" winning first place in the 2024 48-Hour Film Race at the University of Kentucky. In his free time, Hamza enjoys playing the violin, reading and writing screenplays for upcoming projects.

Milena Khanoyan is a filmmaker based in Los Angeles.She studied Film Directing at the Yerevan State College of Culture and Arts after Charles Aznavour from 2020 to January 2024. On April 18, 2024, she relocated to the United States to continue developing her filmmaking career.From an early age, Milena was drawn to the arts and storytelling. Her initial inspiration came from cinema and the idea of becoming an actress, but over time her interest shifted more deeply toward directing, where she found a stronger creative connection.She began her filmmaking journey by creating her first short film with two close friends. Although the project was later removed from social platforms, it marked an important starting point in her creative path.Since then, she has continued to explore experimental and symbolic filmmaking, including projects such as "Heavy Silence," focusing on atmosphere, emotion, and visual storytelling.Milena’s work often leans toward experimental and emotionally driven cinema, with an emphasis on mood, symbolism, and personal narrative exploration.

Santhosh Kumar is an accomplished Ethical Hacker hailing from India, showcasing remarkable talents and expertise in the realm of cybersecurity. From a young age, Santhosh developed a deep fascination with technology and computers, igniting his passion for exploring the world of hacking and cybersecurity. Through self-driven exploration, he quickly acquired the skills to breach security systems and identify vulnerabilities in websites and applications. Despite his youthful years, Santhosh has garnered significant acclaim within the cybersecurity community for his proficiency in ethical hacking. His impressive track record includes successfully cracking numerous social media bugs, earning recognition and praise from esteemed industry experts.Currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Computer Applications (BCA) with a specialization in Cyber security, Ethical Hacking, and Data Forensics, Santhosh adeptly balances his studies with an unwavering passion for ethical hacking. He continually refines his skills and expands his knowledge in the field, driven by a determination to make a positive impact in the realm of cybersecurity,To complement his exceptional accomplishments, Santhosh has cultivated a strong online presence through his website, "heysanthosh .com" This platform serves as a valuable conduit for sharing information about ethical hacking, cybersecurity, and technology, while also providing a platform for him to share his own experiences in the field. With a mission to advocate for responsible hacking practices and educate others about the paramount significance of cybersecurity, Santhosh aims to inspire and empower individuals in the cybersecurity community.

Alexander T. Lukison was born in Newcastle upon Tyne. He was previously a member of the Conservative Party before joining the Labour Party ahead of the 2024 general election. He later stated that he left the Conservatives due to what he described as the same empty promises, and subsequently left the Labour Party for the same reason. He has also said he was encouraged to join Reform following a visit by Reform MP. After joining Reform, he was first elected as a youth councillor for the Northumberland ward. He lives in Gateshead and Durham. His father is a businessman, and his mother was injured in a car crash; as a result, Lukison and his siblings help care for her. He has played rugby union since the age of four, which he says has given him "strong team-building and leadership skills."

Md Mushfiqur Islam Washi is a dynamic entrepreneur and business strategist from Bangladesh, known for his visionary mindset and relentless drive to create global impact. He is the Founder of TheWashiCo, a future-focused conglomerate that aims to build and manage 100+ businesses across diverse industries including e-commerce, technology, fashion, hospitality, and more. He is also the Co-Founder & Administrator of iSolutions, a growing tech-based company, and the Founder of Marketquake, a digital marketing agency dedicated to delivering high-impact growth strategies for online brands and startups. With a strong background in e-commerce, Mushfiqur Washi's is recognized for his practical experience in online business development, brand scaling, and digital innovation. His ability to adapt, lead, and execute in fast-moving markets has positioned him as a rising figure in the South Asian entrepreneurial landscape. From a young age, he has demonstrated leadership and strategic thinking, and his ventures reflect his commitment to excellence, long-term vision, and global ambition. Mushfiqur Washi's work continues to inspire a new generation of entrepreneurs who aim to build beyond borders.

Deklan Gill was raised in a small town from Wyoming. His parents say that from a young age, Deklan has always been an "entertainer." He grew up loving singing and playing instruments.Throughout his education, Deklan was involved in many things. He was a lettering athlete in Cross Country, Basketball, and track. He was also heavily involved in his schools music program which he says "was my absolute favorite part of my high school education.Deklan has seen his fair share of criticism. He was bullied throughout high school which left him drifting from the things he loved. Deklan said, "All of my passions were only bring more negative attention to me and I couldn't handle it anymore so I just started backing away." That was until his uncle Shane Siegfried told him, "Deklan, If you have a gift, it's rude to not share it with the world.""Those words have stuck with me and have been the foundation for my hard work. Two weeks after he told me that he passed away in a car accident. I want to live the life I know I have earned." Deklan states that he wants to inspire with his story and he has been doing so through music. He implements mental health awareness into his music and that has helped him "find a purpose."Deklan now lives in Phoenix Arizona where he is studying Commercial Music at Grand Canyon University. He claims that being in this new environment has helped him regain loves with his passions: singing, dancing, acting, and modeling.

Art Robin is a French-Canadian actor, born Arthur Ulysse Robin in the 12th arrondissement of Paris. He is the oldest of three siblings.He began performing in musicals between the ages of 8 and 12, which introduced him early to stage work and storytelling. Encouraged by his mother, he started learning piano and music theory at the age of 7 and later took up guitar at 15.During the Covid-19 pandemic, with more time at home and fewer school obligations, he began to take acting more seriously as a possible career path. This period marked a shift in focus, allowing him to explore his creative interests more fully.He later trained at the Identity School of Acting, where he studied Theatre, Film, and Television, further refining his craft and deepening his commitment to performance.

Sofiullah Aahmmad (professionally known as Atik Ahmed) is a Bangladeshi photographer, cinematographer, motion designer and web developer based in Rajshahi, Bangladesh. He is known for his black-classic cinematic style in portrait, street, minimal and product photography.Atik started his creative journey as a freelance visual artist in 2022, working with photography, motion graphics and modern web design. Alongside commissioned work, he develops his own visual language through moody lighting, strong contrast and clean composition.He founded the photography and creative community "Alokchitra", which has grown into a space for young photographers and creatives, hosting photo meets, learning sessions and visual storytelling experiments.

Since the age of two, Tonya Hoodyakova has had a passion for performance. Her father, Pavel Hoodyakov, and paternal grandfather, Konstantin Khudyakov, are both famous directors. Her mother, Korneliya Polyak, is an actress and producer. Tonya started to take part in music videos, movies, and commercials at a very early age. She has also appeared on the cover of the children's editions of several magazines, including Daisy Magazine, Owl Deti, and Tatler Deti.She is an accomplished ballroom and Latin dancer, and participates regularly in dancing competitions and contests. In March 2019, at the age of twelve, she, with her partner Marsel Nikitin, won several junior Latin dance categories at Paul Killick's Royal Ball dance competition at The Biltmore Hotel in Downtown Los Angeles, California, USA.She divides her time between Miami, Florida, USA, where she attends the Miami Country Day School, and Moscow, Russia, where her parents live.

Schirin Thoma is a young, up-and-coming model and actress hailing from Switzerland. Despite her youth, Schirin has already made an impression in the world of modeling, acting, dance, and philanthropy. Aiming to inspire other young talents around the world, Schirin has achieved numerous accomplishments in a short amount of time, thanks to her talent and dedication. At the age of just 16, Schirin has already made significant strides in her modeling career. She has been featured in numerous high-profile photo shoots, ad campaigns, and magazines. Over the years, Schirin has modeled for various notable designers such as Michael Lombard, MM Milano, Athea, and Wanda Beauchamp, among others. She has also demonstrated her talent on various catwalks across the globe since 2018, presenting designs and dresses for renowned fashion brands. Schirin has committed herself not only to modeling but also to acting. As a supporting actress, Schirin has played various roles in notable films like Platzspitzbaby, Als Hitler das rosa Kaninchen stahl, Sami, Joe & Ich, and more. In addition, she has modeled for a variety of television commercials like UBS Kids Cup 2019 in Switzerland, Ein Quäntchen Heimat in Germany, and TV series like Frieden in Switzerland. Her acting skills have shown versatility and an exceptional ability to embody a character. Schirin is also a rising star in the dance world, often showcasing her passion and talent in various stage shows. Her ballet skills have won her the Ballett Examen Silbermedaille "Royal Academy of Dance" Switzerland four times since 2017, demonstrating her commitment to pursuing her craft. Moreover, Schirin has also gained recognition for her charitable work. She is an ambassador for various campaigns, projects, and organizations related to health, ethnicity, the environment, and education. One of Schirin's aspirations is to launch her own fashion label and cosmetic products, intending to inspire others in the fashion and beauty industry. Schirin's exceptional talent and passion for modeling, acting, and philanthropy have not gone unnoticed. She has earned various titles, including Miss Catwalk Model Hungary 2021, Miss Fashion Model Hungary 2021, Top Models Fabuk Teen Magazine England 2021, Model of the Year England 2021, Teen Miss Europe Hungary 2021, In Style Model of the Week, and Top 10 Faces of the Month from Child Model Magazine in the USA. She was named Miss Cannes Fashion Days 2022 Title, which is a testament to her natural elegance and grace on the runway. Furthermore, Schirin has also had the opportunity to meet and work with various celebrities, including Johnny Orlando, McKenzie Ziegler, ANNA KALASHNIKOVA, Lauren Orlando, Tamy Glauser, and more. Her ability to work alongside these industry giants has enhanced her reputation as an aspiring young talent in the acting and modeling world. With ambitions to develop her career further, Schirin is steadily working on becoming a household name in the international modeling, acting, dance, and charity fields. Apart from her public work, Schirin is also committed to her education, demonstrating that hard work, passion, and excellence go hand in hand. She serves as a role model for young talents worldwide, inspiring them to follow their passion and strive for success, whatever their background or aspirations may be. The journey of Schirin Thoma is inspirational for aspiring models and actresses around the globe. Reviews stand as a testament to her dedication to her craft and her ever-growing commitment to philanthropy, her education, and her career. With her impeccable talent, versatility, and noteworthy accomplishments, Schirin is undoubtedly one of the rising stars of the modeling and acting world, and we are eager to see where her future takes her.

These collaborations not only showcase his versatility as a musician but also highlight his willingness to learn from others and blend different styles. Through these partnerships, he continues to build a network of support within the industry, paving the way for future projects.ConclusionLil Cee stands as a testament to the power of music as a form of expression and connection. With his roots firmly planted in Kenya and his eyes set on the global stage, he is poised to make a significant impact in the hip-hop landscape. As he continues to share his stories, inspire others, and evolve as an artist, Lil Cee is not just a rapper; he is a voice for his generation, a storyteller, and an ambassador for the rich musical culture of Kenya. Mopara Pair Ayat is a 19 years Old young Bangladeshi Muslim technologist, full-stack software engineer, data scientist, and entrepreneur. Despite his early stage in life, he has demonstrated strong capability in advanced software development, artificial intelligence, and technology-driven business leadership. His work reflects a combination of technical depth, strategic vision, modern design thinking, and ethical grounding.Academic Background: Mopara Pair Ayat has an interdisciplinary academic background in engineering, information technology, and humanities. He has studied Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE) at Selcuk University and completed a Diploma in Islamic History from Ibn Haldun University. He holds a Foundation Diploma and Higher National Diploma (HND) in Information Technology from OTHM (BITHM College of Professionals). He has also completed Computer Science and Engineering studies through an edX program offered by Harvard University and a non-credit Machine Learning program from Columbia University.In addition to formal education, he has completed more than 35 non-credit professional courses from internationally recognized platforms including Harvard University, edX, Udemy, Google, and other institutions. His studies cover software engineering, artificial intelligence, machine learning, cybersecurity, cloud computing, system architecture, and leadership.Technical Expertise: His technical skills include full-stack development using the MERN stack, Node.js, Next.js, Laravel, and PHP. He works with programming languages such as JavaScript, Python, Java, Kotlin, HTML5, and CSS3. His experience also includes mobile and cross-platform development with React Native, Flutter, and native Android. He has expertise in UI and UX design using Tailwind CSS and Bootstrap, backend engineering with Flask and RESTful APIs, and cloud technologies including Docker and scalable hosting solutions.Entrepreneurial Leadership: Mopara Pair Ayat is the Founder, Owner, and Chief Executive Officer of WAASI Technologies Group, an Islamic-oriented global technology enterprise operating across the United Kingdom, Turkey, Iran, and Bangladesh. Under his leadership, the group has launched ventures such as WAASIFLIX LTD, an Islamic digital media platform, and WAASIPAY LTD, a fintech initiative aligned with ethical and Islamic financial principles.Vision: His long-term vision is to build a global technology ecosystem supported by ethical values and innovation. He believes technology should serve humanity with responsibility and integrity. He attributes all success to Almighty Allah.

Atikul Islam Rabbi (born January 29, 2007) is a Bangladeshi cybersecurity and social media security specialist, entrepreneur, and author. He is the founder and CEO of Cyber Infinity, a digital agency that specializes in safeguarding online identities, recovering hacked social media accounts, and advising creators, public figures, and businesses on cybersecurity best practices.Rabbi's passion for technology and digital security began at a young age, when he became fascinated by how information travels online and the vulnerabilities inherent in social media platforms. Over time, he developed expertise in account recovery, social media administration, and online threat prevention, earning recognition for his meticulous approach to digital problem-solving.In addition to his professional work, Rabbi is an accomplished author. His book, Guardians of the Digital Realm: Mastering Social Media Security and the Cybersecurity Specialist's Craft, provides practical guidance on social media security, online privacy, and digital asset protection. It has been published on Google Play Books and serves as a resource for both beginners and aspiring cybersecurity professionals.Rabbi actively shares his knowledge through multiple online platforms, including Crunchbase, F6S, EverybodyWiki, WikiAlpha, GitHub Pages, Medium, and LinkedIn, where he publishes articles, guides, and tutorials about cybersecurity trends, best practices, and emerging online threats. His work emphasizes digital literacy, online safety, and proactive protection, empowering users to secure their digital presence in an increasingly connected world.As an entrepreneur, Rabbi founded Cyber Infinity with the mission of creating a safer online environment for individuals and organizations. Under his leadership, the agency has successfully helped hundreds of clients regain access to hacked accounts, secure business pages, and establish robust cybersecurity protocols. His focus is on ethical hacking, investigative digital techniques, AI integration, and digital marketing strategies to ensure clients' online assets remain safe and under their control.Beyond his professional achievements, Rabbi values education and continuous learning. He is currently pursuing his Higher School Certificate (HSC), having completed his Secondary School Certificate (SSC), while simultaneously building a career that bridges technology, entrepreneurship, and authorship.Rabbi is widely recognized for his ability to simplify complex cybersecurity concepts, making them accessible to a broad audience. He advocates for responsible digital citizenship, emphasizing that a secure online presence is not just a technical requirement, but a critical component of personal identity, reputation, and safety in the modern world.Despite his young age, Atikul Islam Rabbi has established himself as a trusted expert in the field of cybersecurity and social media protection. Through his book, agency, and online presence, he continues to educate, empower, and safeguard digital communities while inspiring the next generation of cybersecurity enthusiasts.Rabbi's vision is to create a future where digital security knowledge is universal, not restricted to professionals. He aims to expand Cyber Infinity globally, publish further educational resources, and collaborate with organizations to promote safe and responsible online practices.

Akande Yusuf, also known as *iamsmallmarley* or *Small Marley*, is not just a musician-he is a symbol of youthful determination and the embodiment of the Nigerian spirit of resilience. His journey from a young boy with a dream to a rising star in the Nigerian music industry is a story of grit, passion, and unwavering commitment to his craft.**Early Life and Beginnings**Small Marley was born and raised in Lagos State, Nigeria, a region known for its rich cultural heritage and dynamic music scene. Growing up in a Yoruba household, he was immersed in the vibrant sounds of Afrobeat, Highlife, and traditional Yoruba music, all of which played a significant role in shaping his musical style. Despite the challenges that come with growing up in a bustling city like Lagos, Small Marley found solace and inspiration in music. His early exposure to the struggles and triumphs of everyday life in Lagos fueled his desire to create music that speaks to the realities of his generation.At the age of 12, most kids are still figuring out what they want to be, but Small Marley was already making moves in the music industry. With no formal backing or industry connections, he independently released his first single, *Awon Omokekeke*. The song, which captured the essence of youthful exuberance and the challenges of street life, quickly gained traction. This early success was a testament to his natural talent and his ability to connect with listeners on a deep, emotional level.**Musical Style and Influences**Small Marley's music is a unique blend of Afrobeat, Afropop, and rap, genres that are deeply rooted in African rhythms and contemporary global sounds. His lyrics often reflect his personal experiences, struggles, and aspirations, making his music relatable to a wide audience. The authenticity of his music is what sets him apart in an industry that is often saturated with commercialized sounds.His early influences include legendary Nigerian artists like Fela Kuti, who is considered the pioneer of Afrobeat, and contemporary stars like Wizkid and Burna Boy, who have successfully taken Afrobeat to the global stage. However, Small Marley has always been determined to carve out his own niche. His sound is not just a replication of what's popular; it's a reflection of his journey, his environment, and his vision for the future.**Breakthrough and Growth**The year 2022 marked a turning point in Small Marley's career. Fully committed to his craft, he began exploring different musical styles and experimenting with new sounds. This period of growth led to the release of several projects that showcased his versatility as an artist. Albums like *Hustle*, *Bad Boy*, and *When Niggas Dey* received critical acclaim, further establishing him as a force to be reckoned with in the Nigerian music scene.Each album and EP released under his label, *Erukumagadascar Music*, tells a different story, yet they all share a common theme of resilience and determination. The *Hustler EP*, for instance, is an anthem for those who are grinding every day to make a better life for themselves. Tracks like *Hustla dey Hustle* and *Struggle* resonate with anyone who has faced obstacles on their path to success. On the other hand, the *Para Boy* EP is a more introspective project, delving into themes of identity, survival, and the complexities of growing up in a rapidly changing world.**Challenges and Perseverance**Despite his growing success, Small Marley has not been immune to the challenges that come with being a young artist in a highly competitive industry. From financial constraints to the pressure of staying relevant in a fast-paced music scene, he has faced numerous hurdles. However, each challenge has only strengthened his resolve. With the unwavering support of his family, especially his mother, who has been a guiding force in his life, Small Marley continues to push the boundaries of his potential.His story is not just about music; it's about overcoming adversity, believing in oneself, and staying true to one's roots. Small Marley's journey serves as an inspiration to many young Nigerians who dream of making it big despite the odds.**Vision and Legacy**Looking to the future, Small Marley's vision is clear: he wants to become one of the most influential artists of his generation. But more than just achieving personal success, he is driven by the desire to make a lasting impact on the music industry and the world at large. He hopes to use his platform to inspire others, to bring attention to social issues, and to promote African culture on a global scale.His label, *Erukumagadascar Music*, is more than just a business venture; it's a platform for nurturing young talent and giving back to the community. Small Marley envisions a future where his label becomes a powerhouse in the African music industry, known for producing quality music and supporting artists who stay true to their art.**ConclusionSmall Marley's journey is just beginning, but the impact he has already made is undeniable. As he continues to grow as an artist and a leader in the music industry, there's no doubt that his influence will only expand. His story is a powerful reminder that with talent, hard work, and the right mindset, anything is possible.In a world where many are content to follow trends, Small Marley stands out as an artist who is not afraid to forge his own path. His music is a gift, not just to himself, but to everyone who listens. And as he continues to share that gift with the world, the future looks incredibly bright for this young, talented musician.

Nabil also plays an active role as a moderator in multiple online science communities, encouraging discussions on scientific advancements and climate change.A skilled web developer, Nabil specializes in MERN stack, Android development, and WordPress. He has led and contributed to notable digital platforms, including Bidibo News and Bidibo's Science Hub, combining his technical expertise with a strong commitment to making scientific knowledge more accessible.As a passionate advocate for sustainability, Nabil is an active member of the 3ZERO Club, focusing on addressing climate change and promoting environmental awareness. Mohammad Sami Chowdhury is a Bangladeshi full-stack web developer, creative technologist, and aspiring filmmaker. He is best known for his work in modern web technologies and real-time digital applications, including the chat platform ChatHawk, launched in 2024.Sami began his career as a self-taught developer, specializing in the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, and Node). Since 2022, he has been actively building intuitive, user-focused applications that combine strong server side architecture with clean front-end interfaces.In 2024, he initiated a pet adoption system project designed to streamline the process of matching pets with new families. This MERN-based application reflects his interest in using technology for social good.Beyond web development, he has explored high-fidelity digital environments, taking inspiration from projects like Social Media Platform. Since 2023, he has been studying software engineering and app development with the goal of producing interactive, visually immersive experiences.Sami also has experience in digital marketing and has contributed to several creative and technical projects that span both web and mobile platforms. He remains active in exploring Machine Learning, server side and real-time technologies as part of his ongoing work.

Sebastian is an emerging rap artist and talented actor, known for his quick-witted rhymes and effortless coolness. Hailing from the heart of Silicon Valley, San Jose, CA, Sebastian was introduced to the power of hip-hop at a young age. The infectious energy of the Kriss Kross' "Jump" video ignited a fire within him, pushing him to memorize every lyric and cementing his love for the genre.Sebastian's younger sister Savannah kickstarted their journey into the spotlight with their YouTube channel, "The FoodStarz," alongside their adorable baby sister Sierra. It was during this time that Sebastian first showcased his rap skills, recording songs for Mountain Mike's Pizza and Denny's restaurants. This humble beginning became the launching pad for his music career.Together with his siblings, Sebastian formed the music group "D'KiddoZ," a force aiming to unleash their unique blend of talents and youthful energy upon the world.Sebastian's talent knows no bounds, as evidenced by his appearances in three music videos for their singles, "The 31st," "Christmas Time is Here," and "Santa's Warning," which are now available on all major streaming platforms.Their catchy track, "Santa's Warning," caught the attention of Bay Area Rap Legend Yuk Mouth from the renowned group The Luniz, who created the iconic song "I Got 5 on It".In addition, Sebastian made his acting debut in a short film titled "Halloween Forever," where he portrayed the horrifying Michael Myers terrorizing two young girls left home alone during Halloween. His performance signaled a promising future in both acting and music.Despite his youth, Sebastian's unwavering determination and exceptional skill set have catapulted him to the status of a rising star to keep an eye on. Fueled by his boundless passion for creativity, he stands poised for a brilliant future in the world of entertainment.**Filmography: ** "The 31st " (Music Video, 2022) - Rap Artist"Christmas Time is Here" (Music Video, 2022) - Rap Artist"Santa's Warning" (Music Video, 2022) - Rap Artist"Halloween Forever" (Movie Short, 2022) - Lead Role

His work centers on youth engagement in politics, current events, and cultural discussion. In 2025, he launched the podcast Now You Know with Knowa De Baraso in partnership with iHeartMedia, where he discusses politics, current events, and pop culture with guests.

Deele G. Barker was born to Derrick and Rochelle Barker. Deele is from Atlanta, Georgia where he attends school, church, and resides in Southwest Atlanta with his family. Derrick Sr., Deele's dad, is from Southwest Atlanta also, attending Southwest Atlanta High School, Morehouse College, and AIU for Grad School. Derrick Sr. also served the country for 20 years as a military pilot. Rochelle, Deele's mom, was born, raised, and grew up in Makati, Philippines, graduating from St. Jude's University. Rochelle moved to the United States in 2010 to start her new life with Derrick Sr. in America. Deele is the youngest brother of six children, and an uncle to one nephew and two nieces.Deele is enrolled at Sing Like A Star LLC for vocal and piano lessons, along with song composition. Deele has also worked with Jiro Street, writer for Atlantic Records, on vocals.Deele was exposed to the music industry early on due to his dad, Derrick Sr. , owner of a small local record label, SWAT Recordz. Deele's discovery could be credited to a few different events. The 2016 Southwest Music Fest was Deele's first public performance. Dennis 'MookB' Butler was the host of the festival, and took the risk to allow a four year old walk-up to get a chance to perform on stage. With that recognition he was picked up by Sky Coffee's, Kid's Got Talent. Dvante Black was one of the judges and saw something special in Deele. Dvante has supported and backed Deele more than anyone, other than Deele's Dad. Although there are many other individuals who have helped along the way, Derrick Sr. and Dvante Black get full credit for discovering Deele.Deele's debut happened on July 30, 2016 at the Southwest Music Fest with MookB from D4L. That was his first time on stage, and the crowd went wild. There were no rehearsals, choreographers, practiced moves, or any kind of preparation, just Deele performing.Deele's breakthrough came on October 1, 2017 when he performed at The City Winery with Victory Spot (Speech from Arrested Development) in the morning, and on that same day performed at The Sweet Auburn Music Fest 2017. These two back to back performances on the same day helped Deele to understand a little better the value of practice and preparation.

Since a young age, Claire has always had a love for the arts. After she moved to her current hometown of Charlotte, North Carolina at 4 years old, she began her mini career in theater. However, it wasn't serious until she realized she actually had a passion for acting in film a few years later, after receiving training at the New York Film Academy; and has been dead set on starting her career since. Other than acting, she's a natural at Archery and has always had a good eye for targets, ever since she picked up a bow. She's on the High School Archery Team at her school. She used to do English horseback riding, and show in Hunter Jumpers; which she may start again soon. She also takes Taekwondo lessons, and self-teaches herself multiple other styles of martial arts. Other than physical skills, she's learning to speak Japanese and hopes to become fluent in the future.

Eadeya was born Amarsanaa Kh. in Bayangol, Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia. Known alternately throughout his career as Eadeya, Slendy, Sead Slendie and Amaraa, is a Mongolian rapper, record producer, composer, songwriter and actor. He's founder, owner and CEO of Alienmath Entertainment. A rapper who first started singing in Mongolian hip hop at the age of 7. He first became popular among his schoolmates by making and uploading songs on Soundcloud. Then he signed with the label Interface Records by his friend Sola Sayze and released his first full-length album About Sead Slendy in 2022. Soon he had beef with rapper Dino and released disrespect track Psycho Bastard, but Sola Sayze got Dino to Interface and Eadeya left Interface Records. Soon after, he landed a starring role in the feature film School Zone. After that Eadeya's older brother Amarbayasgalan Khainzan founded record label named Alienmath Entertainment/Alienmath Records and Eadeya released his second album Emeerald. This album's second single Brokenheart got Alienmath Best Song award. Alienmath started by having four artists, they are Mendee, FiREQ, MG Muge, Eadeya. Soon he released new album again, it called Eadeyatheatre. This album is about how everything darkens and everything becomes sad in the eyes of a teenager, example first single Haalga Togshino is showing how this society looks in the eyes of teenager and second single Chamaas Ene Buhen Bolson is about really angrily singing about the betrayal of friends. In 2025, He signed Ashura to Alienmath Records and produced Ashura's debut album Ashura World. After that he signed Lil Shep to Alienmath Records, and he founded group named Ulaanbaataraas Shuudhan with Lil Shep, MG Muge, Ashura, Daawka, Ermuun.

Nova Flow Boyz is a Kenyan hip hop group from Nairobi, Kenya. Formed in early 2023, the group consists of four members, Jeremiah Msaziri professionally known as Jeraz Ke, Amos Anyera professionally known as Lil Cea, Delland Ochieng professionally known as Potmo and Fulfill Steven professionally known as Bruce Kahid. The group is also known as Rap Monsters. Nova Flow Boyz who are from the Eastlands area in Nairobi the group originated during their Class 8 year at Supaloaf Primary School.Known for their visceral verses, Documentary-style lyricism, and fusion of drill rap, UK rap, gangsta rap and hardcore hip hop, Nova Flow Boyz have emerged as a significant voice in the Kenyan rap scene, frequently collaborating with established acts such as Kaxumbari.They gained mainstream recognition with their first 2024 single Kimangoto. Within its first month, the track amassed over 10,000 streams on Spotify. Although it was later removed from streaming platforms due to a technical error involving the distributor, DistroKid; it was was subsequently re-distributed by ACTS Music Group. Nova Flow Boyz are recognized for their influence on Kenyan urban hip hop, specifically for their integration of Sheng (local slang) and their vivid depictions of life in Nairobi's Eastlands.In an interview on the Wear Your Story podcast, hosted by Moureen Ngigi, manager Peter Ombati (known as Manager Smartboy) described the group as part of a "hiphop renaissance" in Nairobi. He attributed this impact to their ability to create music that resonates with the experiences of ordinary Kenyan youth.
